subcodes.first_line: The names mentioned are present in the Most Holy Court, and the streams of merciful compassion floweth from the Divine Pen. How blessed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسامی مذکوره در ساحت اقدس حاضر و فرات رحمت رحمانی از قلم الهی جاری طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
